allow:

settings, reviews, moodboard messages, edit profile

- Moodboard: "Share with my tech" opens match-selection modal with checkboxes; per-match sharedMoodboards map in App.jsx
- NT dashboard: earnings card tappable, bell/gear header, moodboard tab, calendar client names tappable
- Various: notifications screen, sign in screen, NT moodboard tab, story card vibe tags
